_comment: Monthly-derived returns and 3Y stddev for MAS-coded SG funds where Morningstar's MFsnapshot is empty. Scraped from lt.morningstar.com/api/rest.svc/timeseries_cumulativereturn (most entries) and tokiomarine.com fund-report pages (TMLS-only funds the timeseries feed doesn't expose). Refreshed by scripts/scrape-mas-returns.ts, scripts/scrape-tmls-page-returns.ts, and scripts/backfill-tmls-stddev.ts (stddev-only pass over previously-scraped raw files).
